Package org.eventb.core.seqprover

Class ProverLib

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.seqprover.ProverLib
public class ProverLib extends Object
This is a collection of static constants and methods that are used often in relation to the sequent prover.

Note that they are public but not published and are subject to change. They are to be used at one own's risk. Making referencs to the static functions inside it is highly discouraged since their implementation may change without notice, leaving your code in an uncompilable state.

This does not however prevent you from having your own local copies of the functions that you need, assuming that they do the intended job.

Since:
1.0

    • isProofReusable

      public static boolean isProofReusable(IProofDependencies proofDependencies, IProverSequent sequent, IProofSkeleton skeleton)
      Returns whether the given proof dependencies allow a reuse of the corresponding proof on the given sequent.

      This method does take reasoner versions into account since 2.2.

      This method does take context dependent proofs into account since 3.0. Callers MUST provide a non null proof skeleton when given proof dependencies are context dependent.

      Parameters:
      proofDependencies - proof dependencies of a proof to reuse
      sequent - a sequent on which to check reusability
      skeleton - the skeleton of the proof to check for reusability if proof dependencies are context dependent; null is accepted for context free proof dependencies
      Returns:
      true iff the proof dependencies allow to reuse the proof on the sequent
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if proof dependencies are context dependent and the given skeleton is null
      Since:
      3.0
      See Also:
      • IProofDependencies.isContextDependent()

    • areContextDependentRulesReusable

      private static boolean areContextDependentRulesReusable(IProofSkeleton skeleton, Object origin)

    • isContextDependentRuleReusable

      private static boolean isContextDependentRuleReusable(IProofRule rule, Object origin)
      Ensures that a given rule is replayable from a simple sequent (constructed from needed hypotheses, goal and acted hypotheses), and that the replay produces the exact same rule.

      The sequent must contain the same type environment as the original sequent from which the rule was created to ensure that the reasoner input still type-checks.

      Parameters:
      rule -

    • isRuleReusable

      @Deprecated public static boolean isRuleReusable(IProofRule rule)
      Deprecated.
      Use isRuleReusable(IProofRule, Object) instead.
      Returns whether the given proof rule can be reused.

      A rule is considered reusable iff the following conditions are met:

    • the reasoner which generated the rule is (currently) registered
    • the reasoner which generated the rule has the same version as the version it is (currently) registered with

      • As a consequence, the returned value for a given rule might be different, depending on the contents of the reasoner registry.

      Parameters:
      rule - a proof rule
      Returns:
      true iff the proof rule is reusable
      Since:
      3.0

    • isRuleReusable

      public static boolean isRuleReusable(IProofRule rule, Object origin)
      Returns whether the given proof rule can be reused.

      A rule is considered reusable iff the following conditions are met:

    • the reasoner which generated the rule is (currently) registered
    • the reasoner which generated the rule has the same version as the version it is (currently) registered with

      • As a consequence, the returned value for a given rule might be different, depending on the contents of the reasoner registry.

      Parameters:
      rule - a proof rule
      origin - the origin to use when analyzing the rule in case it was produced by a context dependent reasoner (should be usable as the origin of a proof sequent), can be null
      Returns:
      true iff the proof rule is reusable
      Since:
      3.2

    • hypsTextSearch

      public static Set<Predicate> hypsTextSearch(IProverSequent sequent, String pattern)
      Returns a set of all hypotheses whose string image contains the given pattern. Hidden hypotheses are considered during this search.
      Parameters:
      sequent - sequent containing the hypotheses to search among
      pattern - pattern to search in hypotheses
      Returns:
      a set of all hypotheses matching the given criteria

    • hypsTextSearch

      public static Set<Predicate> hypsTextSearch(IProverSequent sequent, String pattern, boolean withHidden)
      Returns a set of all hypotheses whose string image contains the given pattern. Depending on the third parameter, hidden hypotheses might be considered during this search.
      Parameters:
      sequent - sequent containing the hypotheses to search among
      pattern - pattern to search in hypotheses
      withHidden - also consider hidden hypotheses when true
      Returns:
      a set of all hypotheses matching the given criteria
      Since:
      2.0

    • patternMatches

      private static boolean patternMatches(Predicate pred, String pattern)

    • hypsFreeIdentsSearch

      public static Set<Predicate> hypsFreeIdentsSearch(IProverSequent seq, Set<FreeIdentifier> freeIdents)

    • collectPreds

      public static Set<Predicate> collectPreds(Iterable<Predicate> predIterator)

    • simplify

      public static IProofTree simplify(IProofTree prTree, IProofMonitor monitor)
      Returns a closed simplified version of the given closed proof tree.

      A simplified proof tree contains less unused data. Callers of that method must firstly check that the tree is closed.

      Parameters:
      prTree - the tree to simplify
      monitor - a monitor to manage cancellation, or null
      Returns:
      a closed simplified proof tree, or null if unable to simplify

    • translate

      public static IProofSkeleton translate(IProofSkeleton skeleton, FormulaFactory factory)
      Translates the given skeleton using the given formula factory.
      Parameters:
      skeleton - a proof skeleton to translate
      Returns:
      the translated proof skeleton
      Since:
      3.0
